config.AllowSpouseKiss.name: Allow Spouse Kiss/Hug
config.AllowSpouseKiss.tooltip: Keep the normal kiss/hug available even when the mod has queued morning dialogue. Walk up empty-handed to kiss; talk again to read their dialogue. Keeps kiss-based mods working. Turn off to revert to dialogue-only mornings.
config.AllowVanillaOverride.name: Allow Vanilla Override
config.AllowVanillaOverride.tooltip: Allow content packs to replace the built-in personalized content for the twelve vanilla spouses. Off by default, so packs can only add content for custom NPCs and never change vanilla characters.
config.AnniversaryCalendarMarker.name: Anniversary Calendar Marker
config.AnniversaryCalendarMarker.tooltip: Mark your wedding anniversary with a heart icon on the in-game calendar.
config.ArgumentThresholdHearts.name: Argument Threshold (hearts)
config.ArgumentThresholdHearts.tooltip: Arguments can trigger when friendship drops below this many hearts.
config.BirthdayCalendarMarker.name: Birthday Calendar Marker
config.BirthdayCalendarMarker.tooltip: Mark your character's birthday with a gift icon on the in-game calendar (requires 'Your Birthday Day' to be set below).
config.BirthdayGiftChance.name: Birthday Helpful Gift Chance
config.BirthdayGiftChance.tooltip: Chance your spouse gives you a generally useful item instead of a personalized breakfast on your birthday (0.0 - 1.0).
config.CheatingChance.name: Cheating Chance (per day)
config.CheatingChance.tooltip: Daily chance the spouse cheats while below the cheating threshold (0.0 - 1.0).
config.CheatingThresholdHearts.name: Cheating Threshold (hearts)
config.CheatingThresholdHearts.tooltip: Below this many hearts, a neglected spouse may start an affair and leave you.
config.ChoreChanceAtMaxHearts.name: Chore Chance (at 14 hearts)
config.ChoreChanceAtMaxHearts.tooltip: The daily chore chance at maximum friendship (0.0 - 1.0).
Days the relationship must stay below the warning threshold (after the letter) before divorce.
config.DivorceWarningThresholdHearts.too: The warning letter is sent when friendship drops below this many hearts.
config.EnableAchievementDialogue.name: Enable Achievement Dialogue
config.EnableAchievementDialogue.tooltip: The spouse proudly references your big accomplishments (mines, perfection, legendary fish, etc.).
config.EnableAnniversary.name: Enable Anniversary
config.EnableAnniversary.tooltip: Yearly anniversary reminder, with a bonus for gifting and a penalty for forgetting.
config.EnableArguments.name: Enable Arguments
config.EnableArguments.tooltip: Trigger evening argument events when the relationship is strained.
config.EnableAutoDivorce.name: Enable Auto Divorce
config.EnableAutoDivorce.tooltip: If things stay broken after the warning, the spouse initiates divorce automatically.
config.EnableBadDays.name: Enable Bad Days
config.EnableBadDays.tooltip: The spouse occasionally has a rough day. Comfort them (talk, food, or time) to help.
config.EnableBirthdaySystem.name: Enable Birthday System
config.EnableBirthdaySystem.tooltip: On your birthday the spouse has a small gift and special dialogue waiting for you when you next talk to them.
config.EnableCheating.name: Enable Cheating (Ultimate Punishment)
config.EnableCheating.tooltip: If you badly neglect your spouse, they may have an affair with another single candidate and leave you. Harsh - disable to turn it off entirely.
config.EnableChildrenInteractions.name: Enable Children Interactions
config.EnableChildrenInteractions.toolti: Extra dialogue and a weekly request involving your children, plus harsher arguments with kids home.
config.EnableCustomNpcFramework.name: Enable Custom NPC Framework
config.EnableCustomNpcFramework.tooltip: Let installed content packs give personalized dialogue and behavior to their own custom NPCs (modded spouses). When off, those NPCs use the generic fallback dialogue as before. Doesn't affect vanilla spouses.
config.EnableDebugCommands.name: Enable Debug Commands
config.EnableDebugCommands.tooltip: Register the mo_* testing console commands. Takes effect after restarting the game.
config.EnableDialogueCompat.name: Dialogue Mod Compatibility
config.EnableDialogueCompat.tooltip: Keep this mod's spouse greetings working alongside marriage-dialogue expansion mods (e.g. Haley Ever After). Without it, those mods replace this mod's morning dialogue. Our line shows first, then theirs.
config.EnableDivorceWarning.name: Enable Divorce Warning
config.EnableDivorceWarning.tooltip: The spouse mails an in-character warning letter when friendship gets dangerously low.
config.EnableEvolvingPreferences.name: Enable Evolving Preferences
config.EnableEvolvingPreferences.tooltip: After a year of marriage, the spouse comes to love new gifts tied to your shared history.
config.EnableFeeding.name: Enable Feeding
config.EnableFeeding.tooltip: Spouse expects food in the fridge on 'player provides' days, and cooks on others.
config.EnableForageLoot.name: Enable Forage Loot Table
config.EnableForageLoot.tooltip: When the spouse forages, they bring back items from a per-spouse loot table instead of picking up forage on the farm. Requires Spouse Chores to be enabled.
config.EnableHoneymoonPhase.name: Enable Honeymoon Phase
config.EnableHoneymoonPhase.tooltip: For the first weeks of marriage: boosted friendship, no arguments or bad days, warm dialogue.
config.EnableInsideJokes.name: Enable Inside Jokes
config.EnableInsideJokes.tooltip: The spouse occasionally references shared moments built up over the marriage.
config.EnableJealousy.name: Enable Jealousy
config.EnableJealousy.tooltip: The spouse may get jealous when you gift other NPCs they'd consider rivals.
config.EnableMakeupGifts.name: Enable Makeup Gifts
config.EnableMakeupGifts.tooltip: After a bad argument, the spouse wants a specific category of gift to reconcile.
config.EnableMilestones.name: Enable Milestones
config.EnableMilestones.tooltip: One-time scenes on your 1st, 3rd and 5th anniversary as the relationship grows.
config.EnableMoodSystem.name: Enable Mood System
config.EnableMoodSystem.tooltip: The spouse's daily mood (Happy / Neutral / Grumpy) flavors their greeting dialogue.
config.EnableProductivityScaling.name: Enable Productivity Scaling
config.EnableProductivityScaling.tooltip: Chore quality and frequency follow the spouse's recent happiness (no visible score).
config.EnableRomanticLetters.name: Enable Romantic Letters
config.EnableRomanticLetters.tooltip: Every week or two the spouse leaves a handwritten love letter in your mailbox (flavor only).
config.EnableSeasonalAffection.name: Enable Seasonal Affection
config.EnableSeasonalAffection.tooltip: Warmer dialogue and a gift bonus in the spouse's favorite season; moodier in their least favorite.
config.EnableSharedDreams.name: Enable Shared Dreams
config.EnableSharedDreams.tooltip: Now and then you wake to a journal entry describing a dream the spouse had about you.
config.EnableSkillMilestoneRewards.name: Enable Skill Milestone Rewards
config.EnableSkillMilestoneRewards.toolt: When Farming, Fishing, Foraging, Mining, or Combat reaches level 5 or 10, the spouse gives special dialogue and a small gift.
config.EnableSpouseChores.name: Enable Spouse Chores
config.EnableSpouseChores.tooltip: The spouse may do a helpful farm chore in the morning; chance and quality scale with hearts.
config.EnableSpouseRequestQuest.name: Spouse Requests as Journal Quest
config.EnableSpouseRequestQuest.tooltip: Show each spouse request as a real tracked quest in the journal, not just a letter. Turn off for letter-only requests.
config.EnableSpouseRequests.name: Enable Spouse Requests
config.EnableSpouseRequests.tooltip: The spouse occasionally mails a request; fulfill it within 3 days for a reward.
config.EnableSpouseSickness.name: Enable Spouse Sickness
config.EnableSpouseSickness.tooltip: Once per season the spouse may fall ill and need soup, medicine, or tea to recover.
config.EnableTownGossip.name: Enable Town Gossip
config.EnableTownGossip.tooltip: Townsfolk may mention how your spouse speaks of you, for better or worse (flavor only).
config.EnableVisitorJealousy.name: Enable Visitor Jealousy
config.EnableVisitorJealousy.tooltip: The spouse may make a dry comment when other NPCs visit the farm (flavor only).
config.FeedingSearchExtraStorage.name: Feeding: Search Extra Storage
config.FeedingSearchExtraStorage.tooltip: Also search mini-fridges and the cellar fridge when feeding the spouse and storing chore meals. Helps with modded houses that put the fridge on a different level or have no main-level kitchen.
config.ForageCommonWeight.name: Forage Common Weight
config.ForageCommonWeight.tooltip: Relative chance of a common-tier item per foraged item (higher = more common items).
config.ForageHaulQuantity.name: Forage Haul Quantity
config.ForageHaulQuantity.tooltip: How many items the spouse brings back from a successful forage.
config.ForagePrismaticShardChance.name: Forage Prismatic Shard Chance
config.ForagePrismaticShardChance.toolti: Chance per forage that the spouse finds a Prismatic Shard, with a unique shocked reaction. Very small by design (0.0 - 0.05).
config.ForageRareWeight.name: Forage Rare Weight
config.ForageRareWeight.tooltip: Relative chance of a rare-tier item per foraged item.
config.ForageUncommonWeight.name: Forage Uncommon Weight
config.ForageUncommonWeight.tooltip: Relative chance of an uncommon-tier item per foraged item.
config.FriendshipTieredMorningDialogue.t: The spouse's morning greeting tone scales with your current hearts: cold and clipped when low, loving when high. The mood system still adds day-to-day variance on top. Turn off to use the old single mood greeting.
config.HoneymoonDuration.name: Honeymoon Duration (days)
config.HoneymoonDuration.tooltip: How many in-game days the honeymoon phase lasts after the wedding.
config.JealousyChance.name: Jealousy Chance
config.JealousyChance.tooltip: Chance the spouse notices a gift to a rival NPC (0.0 - 1.0).
config.JealousyChanceLoved.name: Jealousy Chance (Loved Gift)
config.JealousyChanceLoved.tooltip: Chance the spouse notices when the rival gift was a loved item (0.0 - 1.0).
config.MilestoneGiftItemId.name: Milestone Gift Item
config.MilestoneGiftItemId.tooltip: The name of the item the spouse gives as a skill milestone gift (e.g. 'Life Elixir').
config.MilestoneGiftQuantity.name: Milestone Gift Quantity
config.MilestoneGiftQuantity.tooltip: How many of the milestone gift item the spouse gives.
config.MorningHighHeartsMin.name: Warm Tone At (hearts)
config.MorningHighHeartsMin.tooltip: At or above this many hearts the spouse is warm and friendly in the morning (below it, the tone is flat and polite).
config.MorningVeryHighHeartsMin.name: Affectionate Tone At (hearts)
config.MorningVeryHighHeartsMin.tooltip: At or above this many hearts the spouse is openly affectionate in the morning.
config.MorningVeryLowHeartsMax.name: Cold Tone Below (hearts)
config.MorningVeryLowHeartsMax.tooltip: Below this many hearts the spouse is cold and resentful in the morning.
config.MultiplayerCompatibilityMode.name: Multiplayer Compatibility Mode
config.MultiplayerCompatibilityMode.tool: Turns off features known to cause problems in multiplayer (currently: Shared Dreams, which can freeze other players' screens). Recommended ON for multiplayer games, OFF for single-player.
config.PlayerBirthdayDay.name: Your Birthday Day
config.PlayerBirthdayDay.tooltip: The day of the month of your birthday (1-28). Set to 0 to disable the birthday system.
config.PlayerBirthdaySeason.name: Your Birthday Season
config.PlayerBirthdaySeason.tooltip: The season of your character's birthday (vanilla has no player birthday, so set it here).
config.SicknessChancePerSeason.name: Sickness Chance (per season)
config.SicknessChancePerSeason.tooltip: The chance the spouse gets sick at some point each season (0.0 - 1.0).
general.24: Morning. The coffee's fresh and the day's wide open. Not bad, right?
general.25: I fed the cat already. Don't worry, I told it you love it more.
general.26: Sleep well? You were mumbling about crops again. It was kind of adorable.
general.27: I'll be here when you get back. Same as always. I kind of love that about us.
general.28: Don't forget to eat something out there. You always forget, and I always notice.
general.29: The sun's barely up and you're already raring to go. I admire that. From bed, mostly.
general.30: I dreamed we were old and grey and still doing exactly this. Wouldn't change a thing.
general.31: Take a jacket. ...I know, I know. But humor me.
general.32: Funny how a quiet morning with you beats anything fancy I ever wanted before.
general.33: I left a little note in your bag. Don't read it 'til lunch. ...Okay, read it whenever.
general.34: You make this old farmhouse feel like the best place in the valley.
general.35: Whatever's been weighing on you lately — we'll figure it out. Together. Always together.
general.36: I caught myself talking about you to the chickens this morning. They're very supportive.
general.37: Go on, work your magic out there. I'll keep the home fires going.
general.38: I love that the first face I see each day is yours. Even the bedhead. Especially the bedhead.
general.39: Come back to me in one piece, alright? That's the only rule I've got.
mood.grumpy.Abigail.1: Ugh. Morning. Everything's annoying today and I don't know why. Just... bear with me.
mood.grumpy.Abigail.2: Hey. I'm in a mood. Not your fault. Probably. Just give me a little room.
mood.grumpy.Abigail.3: Morning. I feel all restless and prickly today. Don't take it personally.
mood.grumpy.Alex.1: Morning. I'm in a funk today. It's not you, I just woke up off. Gimme some room.
mood.grumpy.Alex.2: Hey. Not feelin' great today. I'll shake it off, just... go easy on me.
mood.grumpy.Alex.3: Yeah, mornin'. Kind of a rough head today. Don't mind me bein' quiet.
mood.grumpy.Elliott.1: Good morning. A grey humor has me in its grip today. Forgive my poor company.
mood.grumpy.Elliott.2: Morning. The muse has fled and taken my cheer with her. I'll be poor conversation.
mood.grumpy.Elliott.3: Ah. Morning. My spirits are at low tide. Bear with me 'til they turn.
mood.grumpy.Emily.1: Morning. The energy's all jagged and grey today. I need to sit quietly with it.
mood.grumpy.Emily.2: Oh. Morning. My spirit feels heavy. I'll work through it, but go gently, okay?
mood.grumpy.Emily.3: Morning. The colors are all muddled this morning. I just need a little space.
mood.grumpy.Haley.1: Ugh. Today is already the worst and it just started. Don't test me.
mood.grumpy.Haley.2: Morning. I'm cranky and my hair won't cooperate. Approach with caution.
mood.grumpy.Haley.3: Hmph. I'm in a mood and I refuse to apologize for it. Morning, though.
mood.grumpy.Harvey.1: Good morning. I, ah, woke up rather out of sorts. Best give me a bit of space.
mood.grumpy.Harvey.2: Morning. My nerves are a touch frayed today. It'll settle. Bear with me, won't you?
mood.grumpy.Harvey.3: Oh. Morning. I'm feeling a little low today. Nothing serious — just need some quiet.
mood.grumpy.Leah.1: Morning. Feeling blocked and cranky. Best to let me grumble at the clay alone.
mood.grumpy.Leah.2: Hey. I'm in a mood today. It'll pass. Just give me some room 'til it does.
mood.grumpy.Leah.3: Morning. ...Not my best day. Don't mind me. I'll come around.
mood.grumpy.Maru.1: Morning. My focus is fried and my patience is thin. Bear with me, okay?
mood.grumpy.Maru.2: Oh. Morning. Brain's running too many processes today. I need to defrag. Alone.
mood.grumpy.Maru.3: Morning. I'm irritable and I can't quantify why. Just... give me a little space.
mood.grumpy.Penny.1: Good morning. I'm feeling a little fragile today. Please be patient with me.
mood.grumpy.Penny.2: Morning. My head's full of worries this morning. I'll try not to let it show.
mood.grumpy.Penny.3: ...Morning. I'm a bit out of sorts. It's nothing you did. I just need a quiet day.
mood.grumpy.Sam.1: Morning. The music in my head went quiet today. Kinda bummed. Don't mind me.
mood.grumpy.Sam.2: Hey. I'm in a weird funk this morning. Not your fault. Just gimme a bit.
mood.grumpy.Sam.3: Mornin'. Feelin' off today, can't shake it. I'll be alright. Probably.
mood.grumpy.Sebastian.1: Morning. Pulling inward today. It's not you. Just one of those grey ones.
mood.grumpy.Sebastian.2: Hey. Not in a talking place this morning. I'll be down in the basement.
mood.grumpy.Sebastian.3: Morning. Everything feels far away today. Give me some space and I'll come back around.
mood.grumpy.Shane.1: Morning. The dark kind of rolled back in today. Don't push it, okay? I'm tryin'.
mood.grumpy.Shane.2: Hey. ...Rough one today. Nothin' happened, it just hit. Just let me be for now.
mood.grumpy.Shane.3: ...Morning. Feelin' low. It's not you. Just gotta get through it. Bear with me.
mood.grumpy.generic.1: Morning. I'm a bit out of sorts today. It's nothing you did. Just bear with me.
mood.grumpy.generic.2: Oh. Morning. Not feeling my best today. I'd rather keep to myself for a while.
mood.grumpy.generic.3: ...Morning. I woke up in a mood. It'll pass. Just go a little easy on me, okay?
mood.happy.Abigail.1: Morning! I'm in a stupidly good mood and I'm blaming you for it. In a good way.
mood.happy.Abigail.2: Hey! Today feels like an adventure waiting to happen. Let's go cause some trouble.
mood.happy.Abigail.3: Ugh, why are you so cute in the morning? It's distracting. Anyway, good morning!
mood.happy.Alex.1: Morning, babe! I'm so pumped today, I could lift the whole barn. You give me that energy.
mood.happy.Alex.2: Hey! Feelin' unstoppable this morning. Best part? Gettin' to share it with you.
mood.happy.Alex.3: Good mornin', gorgeous! Today's gonna be a winner, I can feel it in my bones.
mood.happy.Elliott.1: Good morning! My spirits soar like gulls over the tide today. The words simply pour out.
mood.happy.Elliott.2: Ah, what a glorious morning. Inspiration courses through me — and you, my dear, are its source.
mood.happy.Elliott.3: Morning, my love! The day gleams with promise, and my pen can scarcely keep pace with my joy.
mood.happy.Emily.1: Good morning! The energy in here is just radiant today. I feel it shimmering all around us.
mood.happy.Emily.2: Morning, love! My spirit's practically dancing. The colors are so vivid I could cry happy tears.
mood.happy.Emily.3: Mmm, what a beautiful morning. The whole universe feels like it's smiling on us.
mood.happy.Haley.1: Morning! I'm having a great day already and it's barely started. Lucky you, getting to share it.
mood.happy.Haley.2: Hey, gorgeous. I feel amazing today, which means YOU get to bask in it. You're welcome.
mood.happy.Haley.3: Good morning! Ugh, I'm in such a good mood I might even be nice to people. Don't get used to it.
mood.happy.Harvey.1: Good morning! I, ah, feel positively wonderful today. Quite the rare diagnosis for me.
mood.happy.Harvey.2: Morning, dear! My heart's light as a feather. I'd prescribe a day like this to everyone.
mood.happy.Harvey.3: Good morning! I woke up humming, if you can believe it. You bring that out in me.
mood.happy.Leah.1: Morning! I'm buzzing with ideas today. Good mood, good light, good company. Perfect.
mood.happy.Leah.2: Hey, you. I feel so light this morning. Like I could create anything. You do that to me.
mood.happy.Leah.3: Good morning! The whole world looks paintable today. Especially you, half-asleep like that.
mood.happy.Maru.1: Morning! All my readings say today's going to be great. Subjective ones, too. Mostly about you.
mood.happy.Maru.2: Good morning! I woke up energized and ready to invent something brilliant. You're a great catalyst.
mood.happy.Maru.3: Hey! My mood's running at peak efficiency today. Correlation with you is, frankly, undeniable.
mood.happy.Penny.1: Good morning! I woke up smiling and I couldn't tell you why. Then I saw you.
mood.happy.Penny.2: Morning, dear. My heart just feels so full today. Thank you for that.
mood.happy.Penny.3: Good morning. Everything feels gentle and right this morning. I hope your day is too.
mood.happy.Sam.1: Morning! I'm in SUCH a good mood, I already wrote half a song before coffee. It's a bop.
mood.happy.Sam.2: Yo! Today feels awesome and we haven't even done anything yet. That's the good stuff.
mood.happy.Sam.3: Hey, hey! Feelin' great today. You've got a lot to do with that, just sayin'.
mood.happy.Sebastian.1: Morning. Weirdly good mood today. Don't make a thing of it. ...Okay, maybe make a small thing of it.
mood.happy.Sebastian.2: Hey. I actually feel good today. Light, even. That's, uh, a you thing. Obviously.
mood.happy.Sebastian.3: Morning. I caught myself smiling earlier. Out of nowhere. Then I remembered it was 'cause of you.
mood.happy.Shane.1: Hey. Today feels... lighter, somehow. Good lighter. Hadn't felt that in a while. It's you.
mood.happy.Shane.2: Morning. Woke up in an actual good mood. Weird, right? The good kind of weird. Thanks to you.
mood.happy.Shane.3: Hey, you. Feelin' alright today. Better than alright, honestly. You did that.
mood.happy.generic.1: Good morning! I'm in such high spirits today. Everything just feels right with you here.
mood.happy.generic.2: Morning, sweetheart! My heart's so light this morning. You have everything to do with that.
mood.happy.generic.3: Good morning, my love! Today feels full of promise — and it starts with seeing you.
morning.Abigail.High.4: Morning! I dreamt we found a secret level under the mines. We'd crush it, you and me.
morning.Abigail.High.5: Hey, you're up! I saved you the comics page. Don't say I never do anything sweet.
morning.Abigail.High.6: Morning! I'm itching to do something reckless today. ...In a fun way. Wanna?
morning.Abigail.High.7: There you are. I like that the house gets louder when you wake up. Less boring.
morning.Abigail.Low.4: Morning. I might lose myself in a game for a few hours. Don't wait up.
morning.Abigail.Low.5: Hey. There's coffee somewhere. Probably. Look around.
morning.Abigail.Low.6: Oh, morning. I had weird dreams about the caves again.
morning.Abigail.Low.7: Morning. I'm gonna reorganize my amethyst collection or something.
morning.Abigail.VeryHigh.4: Morning, you. I made a whole plan for a date in the mines. Romantic AND dangerous. You're welcome.
morning.Abigail.VeryHigh.5: Ugh, look at you all sleepy. I could marry you all over again right now. Don't tempt me.
morning.Abigail.VeryHigh.6: Hey. I stayed up half the night just talking with you and I'd do it again every night. I'm obsessed with you, okay?
morning.Abigail.VeryHigh.7: C'mere, my favorite adventurer. One kiss for luck before you go save the world, hm?
morning.Abigail.VeryLow.4: Morning. I'd honestly rather be in the mines than here right now.
morning.Abigail.VeryLow.5: You. Hi. I'm gonna go find something more interesting to do.
morning.Abigail.VeryLow.6: Yeah, yeah, morning. Spare me the small talk, okay?
morning.Abigail.VeryLow.7: Don't. Just... don't, today. I'm not feeling it.
morning.Alex.High.4: Mornin', babe! Got a good feelin' today. Might be the sun. Probably it's you.
morning.Alex.High.5: Hey! I was thinkin' we could go for a jog later. ...Or a walk. A slow one. Whatever you want.
morning.Alex.High.6: There's my favorite person. C'mon, let's make today count, yeah?
morning.Alex.High.7: Morning! Slept like a champ. Always do when you're next to me.
morning.Alex.Low.4: Morning. Thinkin' I'll hit the gym, then maybe nap. Wild day, I know.
morning.Alex.Low.5: Oh, hey. There's protein stuff in the fridge if you're hungry. Help yourself.
morning.Alex.Low.6: Morning. Gonna toss the gridball around with Dusty later.
morning.Alex.Low.7: Hey you. Still wakin' up. Gimme a sec to find my brain.
morning.Alex.VeryHigh.4: Hey, babe. Wakin' up to you is better than any win I've ever had. And I've had some good ones.
morning.Alex.VeryHigh.5: I used to think being strong meant never needin' anybody. Then you came along and proved me wrong. Best loss of my life.
morning.Alex.VeryHigh.6: C'mere, gorgeous. One kiss for the road. A day that starts with you is already a win.
morning.Alex.VeryHigh.7: I just laid here grinnin' at you sleepin'. You turn the tough guy to total mush. Don't tell the team.
morning.Alex.VeryLow.4: Morning. Gonna go clear my head with a workout. Don't wait.
morning.Alex.VeryLow.5: Oh. You're up. Yeah, I'm just... not in a talkin' place. Sorry.
morning.Alex.VeryLow.6: Hey. Rough headspace today. Gimme some room, alright?
morning.Alex.VeryLow.7: Morning. ...Yeah. I got nothin' good to say, so I'll keep quiet.
morning.Elliott.High.4: Good morning. I woke with a fine turn of phrase — and you, of course, were its subject.
morning.Elliott.High.5: Ah, there you are, like the first good line of a poem. The day may begin now.
morning.Elliott.High.6: Morning, my dear. The waves are gentle today. Almost as lovely as your sleepy face.
morning.Elliott.High.7: Good morning. Linger a moment, won't you? You make even the ordinary worth writing down.
morning.Elliott.Low.4: Good morning. The sea and a blank page await me. A quiet day, I think.
morning.Elliott.Low.5: Ah, risen at last. I'll be walking the shore, gathering what thoughts I can.
morning.Elliott.Low.6: Morning. The muse keeps her distance, so I shall court her with tea and patience.
morning.Elliott.Low.7: Good day to you. I've a chapter to wrestle into submission. Wish me well.
morning.Elliott.VeryHigh.4: Ah, my muse wakes. I've half a sonnet already, and every line bends toward you, as all my lines do.
morning.Elliott.VeryHigh.5: I watched the dawn paint the sea and thought only of you. The horizon is grand, but it is not you.
morning.Elliott.VeryHigh.6: Come, sit a breath with me before the day claims you. Let me hold this moment like a favorite verse.
morning.Elliott.VeryHigh.7: Each morning beside you is a stanza I'd reread forever. What fortune, to live inside the poem I longed to write.
morning.Elliott.VeryLow.4: Good morning. The words have abandoned me, and with them, my warmth. Forgive me.
morning.Elliott.VeryLow.5: Ah. You wake. I'll keep my silence; it's all I have today.
morning.Elliott.VeryLow.6: Morning. A grey tide has rolled in. I'd sooner weather it alone.
morning.Elliott.VeryLow.7: Good day. ...Or so one hopes. I've little cheer to lend it.
morning.Emily.High.4: Good morning! I felt the sun's energy the moment you stirred. It's a beautiful day.
morning.Emily.High.5: Morning, love. I had the most colorful dream — all warm hues. You were the gold.
morning.Emily.High.6: Hello, you. The crystals were practically singing when I woke. A good sign for us.
morning.Emily.High.7: Morning! Come find me later — your aura always brightens my afternoon.
morning.Emily.Low.4: Good morning. The spirits are quiet today. Just an ordinary day, I think.
morning.Emily.Low.5: Oh, hello. I dreamt in greys last night. Nothing worth sharing.
morning.Emily.Low.6: Morning. I've some fabric I want to dye today. We'll see what the colors say.
morning.Emily.Low.7: Morning. The house feels calm and plain today. That's alright.
morning.Emily.VeryHigh.4: Mmm, good morning, beloved. Our energies braided together while we slept. I can still feel the warmth of it.
morning.Emily.VeryHigh.5: I woke before you and just watched the light play on your face. The universe outdid itself, making you.
morning.Emily.VeryHigh.6: Morning, my love. The spirits whispered your name and mine in the same breath. We're meant, you and I.
morning.Emily.VeryHigh.7: Come here before you go. Let me hold your hands a moment — I want to carry your warmth all day.
morning.Emily.VeryLow.4: Morning. The energy between us feels frayed. I need to sit with it.
morning.Emily.VeryLow.5: Oh. You're up. The colors are muddled today. I'd rather be still.
morning.Emily.VeryLow.6: ...Hello. My spirit's pulled inward. Please don't tug at it.
morning.Emily.VeryLow.7: Morning. I'll be with my crystals. Alone, for now.
morning.Haley.High.4: Morning, cutie! Stand by the window — the light's making you look really good.
morning.Haley.High.5: Hey, you. I'm having a great hair day, which means it's gonna be a great day.
morning.Haley.High.6: Morning! I want to take some pictures of the flowers today. And maybe you. Definitely you.
morning.Haley.High.7: There you are. You know you're kind of growing on me, right? Don't make it weird.
morning.Haley.Low.4: Morning. I've got a whole shoot planned, so don't get in the frame.
morning.Haley.Low.5: Oh, hey. You might want to comb that hair before you go out. Just saying.
morning.Haley.Low.6: Morning. The light's perfect today. For photos, I mean.
morning.Haley.Low.7: Hey. There's juice in the fridge. I didn't make it for you specifically. But it's there.
morning.Haley.VeryHigh.4: Morning, gorgeous. I took, like, five photos of you sleeping. You can't have them. They're for me.
morning.Haley.VeryHigh.5: Ugh, you're too cute in the morning, it's unfair. Come here and kiss me before I change my mind.
morning.Haley.VeryHigh.6: I used to think I'd marry someone rich and fancy. Turns out I just wanted you. Don't let it go to your head.
morning.Haley.VeryHigh.7: Good morning, my favorite person to wake up to. Yes, I said it. Yes, I mean it. Now go be amazing.
morning.Haley.VeryLow.4: Ugh. Don't talk to me before I've fixed my hair, okay?
morning.Haley.VeryLow.5: Morning. I'm busy. With... important things. Not you things.
morning.Haley.VeryLow.6: Oh, you're up. Cool. I'll be over here. Far over here.
morning.Haley.VeryLow.7: Whatever. Just... give me a minute. Or an hour. Or the day.
morning.Harvey.High.4: Good morning, dear! I, ah, woke with a smile before I quite knew why. Then I saw you.
morning.Harvey.High.5: Morning! Do mind yourself on the farm today. I do worry, you know — fondly.
morning.Harvey.High.6: There you are. A good night's sleep and your face — quite the prescription for happiness.
morning.Harvey.High.7: Good morning. I made coffee just the way you like it. Small thing, but... well, I like caring for you.
morning.Harvey.Low.4: Good morning. I've patient files to review this morning, I'm afraid.
morning.Harvey.Low.5: Oh, hello. Did you rest enough? ...Right. I'll not lecture. Today.
morning.Harvey.Low.6: Morning. There's coffee, though do go easy — for your heart, you know.
morning.Harvey.Low.7: Good morning. I'll be at the clinic for a spell. Routine matters.
morning.Harvey.VeryHigh.4: Good morning, my love. I, ah, took my own pulse just now, watching you. Still racing. You're remarkably bad for my composure.
morning.Harvey.VeryHigh.5: Waking beside you is the finest medicine I know, and I've read a great deal about medicine. Trust me on this one.
morning.Harvey.VeryHigh.6: Come here a moment before you go. ...Doctor's orders. A kiss does wonders for the heart, you understand.
morning.Harvey.VeryHigh.7: I spent years being cautious, careful, closed. You opened every door. Each morning with you, I'm grateful you knocked.
morning.Harvey.VeryLow.4: Oh. Morning. I'm, ah, not quite right today. Best to give me space.
morning.Harvey.VeryLow.5: Good morning. Forgive me — I haven't the heart for conversation just now.
morning.Harvey.VeryLow.6: ...Hello. A restless night. I'll keep to myself, I think.
morning.Harvey.VeryLow.7: Morning. I'm out of sorts. Nothing a quiet day won't mend, I hope.
morning.Leah.High.4: Morning, you. The light's gorgeous today — makes me want to paint the whole farm.
morning.Leah.High.5: Hey. I picked some wild berries on my walk. Left the good ones for you.
morning.Leah.High.6: Morning! Come by the studio later. I could use my favorite muse around.
morning.Leah.High.7: There you are. Mornings with you feel like the start of something good. Every time.
morning.Leah.Low.4: Morning. Might walk down to the forest and forage a bit today.
morning.Leah.Low.5: Oh, hey. The kettle's warm if you want tea. I'm heading out soon.
morning.Leah.Low.6: Morning. I've got a block to push through. Wish me luck. Or don't.
morning.Leah.Low.7: Hey you. Slept alright? I'm gonna get my hands dirty with some clay.
morning.Leah.VeryHigh.4: Morning, love. I sketched you while you slept. Don't be shy — you're my best work yet.
morning.Leah.VeryHigh.5: I gave up so much for a real life, and here it is, warm beside me. You're everything I ran toward.
morning.Leah.VeryHigh.6: C'mere. Let's steal five quiet minutes before the day starts pulling. Just you, me, and the morning.
morning.Leah.VeryHigh.7: I woke up wanting to make something beautiful, then I looked at you and thought — already done.
morning.Leah.VeryLow.4: Morning. I've got nothing in me for talking today. Sorry.
morning.Leah.VeryLow.5: Oh. You're up. I'll be in the studio. Door closed.
morning.Leah.VeryLow.6: Hey. ...Just let me have my coffee in peace, yeah?
morning.Leah.VeryLow.7: Morning. I'm in a mood. Best to leave me to it.
morning.Maru.High.4: Good morning! I had a breakthrough idea at 3 a.m. and you were oddly central to it.
morning.Maru.High.5: Morning, you. My readings say it's going to be a good day. I trust the data. And you.
morning.Maru.High.6: Hey! I built a little something for the kitchen. Wanted to make your mornings easier.
morning.Maru.High.7: Morning. Come by the lab later — productivity measurably spikes when you're nearby.
morning.Maru.Low.4: Morning. I'm calibrating something in the lab today. Don't touch anything.
morning.Maru.Low.5: Oh, hello. Statistically you slept too little again. I'll let it go. For now.
morning.Maru.Low.6: Morning. There's coffee — I timed the brew precisely. You're welcome.
morning.Maru.Low.7: Hey. I've got a shift at the clinic later. Long day ahead.
morning.Maru.VeryHigh.4: Good morning, my love. I tried to graph how happy you make me and the line just... left the page. Beautiful, unscientific chaos.
morning.Maru.VeryHigh.5: I ran every model of a good life, and somehow they all converge on you. Statistically improbable. Personally, inevitable.
morning.Maru.VeryHigh.6: Morning. I lay here recording how peaceful you look asleep. For science. ...Okay, for me. I love you.
morning.Maru.VeryHigh.7: Come here before you go. A goodbye kiss optimizes my entire day. Repeatable result. Indulge the scientist.
morning.Maru.VeryLow.4: Morning. My focus is elsewhere right now. We'll talk later. Maybe.
morning.Maru.VeryLow.5: Oh. You're up. I've got variables to sort that aren't... us.
morning.Maru.VeryLow.6: ...Hi. Running low on patience this morning. Give me room.
morning.Maru.VeryLow.7: Morning. Let's not, okay? I'm not in the mood to process anything.
morning.Penny.High.4: Good morning, dear. I already opened the windows — it's such a lovely day.
morning.Penny.High.5: Morning! I read the sweetest story last night. It made me think of us.
morning.Penny.High.6: There you are. I always sleep better knowing you're beside me.
morning.Penny.High.7: Good morning. Don't rush off without breakfast — I worry, you know.
morning.Penny.Low.4: Good morning. I thought I might visit the library later.
morning.Penny.Low.5: Morning. I've tidied the kitchen already, if you need anything.
morning.Penny.Low.6: Oh, you're up. There's porridge on the stove, if you'd like.
morning.Penny.Low.7: Morning. I'll see to a few chores around the house today.
morning.Penny.VeryHigh.4: Good morning, my love. I lay awake just listening to you breathe. Is that strange? I don't care. It made me happy.
morning.Penny.VeryHigh.5: Waking up to you, safe and warm... I never imagined I could have a life this gentle. Thank you, truly.
morning.Penny.VeryHigh.6: Morning, sweetheart. Whatever the day holds, come home to me. That's all I ever need.
morning.Penny.VeryHigh.7: I made your favorite for breakfast. Small thing, I know. But loving you is all the little things, isn't it?
morning.Penny.VeryLow.4: Good morning. I'll keep to my reading. I won't be in your way.
morning.Penny.VeryLow.5: Oh. You're awake. I... never mind. Have a good day.
morning.Penny.VeryLow.6: Morning. I didn't want to bother you, so I've stayed quiet.
morning.Penny.VeryLow.7: Hello. I'm a bit fragile today. Please, just go easy.
morning.Sam.High.4: Yo, morning! I'm feelin' good today. You've got somethin' to do with that, I bet.
morning.Sam.High.5: Hey! I came up with a sick riff last night. Might play it for you later if you're nice.
morning.Sam.High.6: Mornin', you! Let's do somethin' fun today. I'm in a fun mood, gotta use it.
morning.Sam.High.7: There's my favorite human. Mornings stopped suckin' when you showed up, y'know?
morning.Sam.Low.4: Morning. Gonna noodle on the guitar for a bit, I think.
morning.Sam.Low.5: Oh, hey. There's cereal. Breakfast of champions. Or just me.
morning.Sam.Low.6: Mornin'. Might meet up with Seb later. Or not. We'll see.
morning.Sam.Low.7: Hey you. Still bootin' up over here. Need like, three more minutes.
morning.Sam.VeryHigh.4: Yo, morning! I literally wrote 'I love you' into a guitar solo last night. It shreds. You're welcome.
morning.Sam.VeryHigh.5: Dude — spouse — wakin' up next to you never gets old. Best part of every single day, hands down.
morning.Sam.VeryHigh.6: C'mere, gimme a kiss before you go be awesome. Gotta send my favorite person off right.
morning.Sam.VeryHigh.7: I was just layin' here watchin' you sleep, grinnin' like a dork. You make me so dumb-happy it's embarrassing. Love it.
morning.Sam.VeryLow.4: Hey. ...Yeah, kinda in a funk. Don't worry about it, I'll deal.
morning.Sam.VeryLow.5: Oh. Mornin'. I'm just gonna lay low today, if that's cool.
morning.Sam.VeryLow.6: ...Hey. Not feelin' super chatty. It's not you. Just one of those.
morning.Sam.VeryLow.7: Morning. Eh. Brain's all static today. Gimme some space, yeah?
morning.Sebastian.High.4: Morning. ...Slept good, actually. Pretty sure that's a you thing.
morning.Sebastian.High.5: Hey, you. The quiet out here with you? Didn't know I needed it this bad.
morning.Sebastian.High.6: Morning. Come bug me later, if you want. I, uh, like it when you do.
morning.Sebastian.High.7: Hey. It's raining. My favorite. Even better with you here, not gonna lie.
morning.Sebastian.Low.4: Morning. Got a build to finish today. I'll be at the desk.
morning.Sebastian.Low.5: Oh, hey. Coffee's on. I'm still mostly asleep, honestly.
morning.Sebastian.Low.6: Morning. Might take the bike out if the weather holds. We'll see.
morning.Sebastian.Low.7: Hey. Slept okay, I guess. Long day of code ahead.
morning.Sebastian.VeryHigh.4: Morning. I'm in a good mood, which is weird for me, so document it. ...It's you. It's always you.
morning.Sebastian.VeryHigh.5: I spent years feeling like background noise. You wake up every day and make me feel like the main thing. I don't take that lightly.
morning.Sebastian.VeryHigh.6: C'mere before you go. I'm bad with words this early — or, you know, ever — so just let me hold onto you a sec.
morning.Sebastian.VeryHigh.7: Watched the rain with you asleep on my arm and thought, yeah. This is the life I never thought I'd get. I'm keeping it.
morning.Sebastian.VeryLow.4: Morning. Gonna be in the basement. Don't really wanna talk.
morning.Sebastian.VeryLow.5: ...Hey. One of those grey ones. Just leave me to it, okay?
morning.Sebastian.VeryLow.6: Oh. You're up. I'm not great company today. Sorry.
morning.Sebastian.VeryLow.7: Morning. Got nothing to say that's worth saying right now.
morning.Shane.High.4: Hey. Slept alright for once. Pretty sure that's 'cause you're here.
morning.Shane.High.5: Morning. Goin' to say hi to the chickens. ...You can tag along, if you feel like it.
morning.Shane.High.6: There you are. Didn't expect mornings to get easier. Then you happened.
morning.Shane.High.7: Hey, you. Woke up and you were the first good thought I had. Beats how mornings used to go.
morning.Shane.Low.4: Morning. Gotta head out and check on the blue chickens.
morning.Shane.Low.5: Oh, hey. Coffee's strong, the way I need it. Help yourself.
morning.Shane.Low.6: Morning. Gonna be a slog of a day. Let's just get into it.
morning.Shane.Low.7: Hey you. Draggin' a bit this morning. Gimme a minute.
morning.Shane.VeryHigh.4: Hey. Woke up and actually felt okay. Hopeful, even. That's you. Just... thanks. For all of it.
morning.Shane.VeryHigh.5: Used to figure I'd never get anything worth keeping. Then there's you, every morning. Still can't believe my luck.
morning.Shane.VeryHigh.6: C'mere before you head out. I'm garbage at this stuff, so just — let me hold you a sec, alright?
morning.Shane.VeryHigh.7: Every morning you're still here is one the old me wouldn't have believed. I'm not wastin' a single one. Promise.
morning.Shane.VeryLow.4: ...Morning. Rough headspace today. Don't push it, okay?
morning.Shane.VeryLow.5: Oh. You're up. Yeah. Gonna keep to myself for a while.
morning.Shane.VeryLow.6: Morning. Got nothin' in the tank today. Sorry.
morning.Shane.VeryLow.7: Hey. ...One of those mornings. Just let it be, alright?
morning.generic.High.4: Good morning! The house feels brighter the moment you wake up.
morning.generic.High.5: Morning, you. I slept well, knowing you were right beside me.
morning.generic.High.6: There you are. Come find me later, would you? I like having you near.
morning.generic.High.7: Good morning. Be safe out there today — and hurry back to me.
morning.generic.Low.4: Good morning. I'll be keeping busy around here today.
morning.generic.Low.5: Morning. There's something warm on the stove if you're hungry.
morning.generic.Low.6: Oh, you're up. I've a few things to see to today.
morning.generic.Low.7: Good morning. Take care of yourself out there.
morning.generic.VeryHigh.4: Good morning, my love. Waking up beside you is the best part of every single day.
morning.generic.VeryHigh.5: I lay here just watching you sleep. I still can't believe this wonderful life is ours.
morning.generic.VeryHigh.6: Come give me a kiss before you go. A moment with you sets my whole heart right.
morning.generic.VeryHigh.7: There's nowhere in the valley I'd rather be than right here, with you, this morning and every morning.
morning.generic.VeryLow.4: Morning. I'm not really up for talking today. Sorry.
morning.generic.VeryLow.5: Oh. You're awake. I'd rather keep to myself for now.
morning.generic.VeryLow.6: Morning. Didn't sleep well. Best give me some room.
morning.generic.VeryLow.7: Hey. ...Not much to say today. Leave me be, would you?
